title: Samrat Choudhary swearing-in LIVE: BJP's Samrat Choudhary sworn in as Bihar chief minister by Governor Syed Ata Hasnain
description: Bihar gets its first BJP chief minister as Samrat Choudhary is sworn in at Lok Bhawan in Patna, ending Nitish Kumar's long reign and opening a new chapter for the NDA in the state.
